message:
feat(embed,fsfs,ops): bundled default models, auto-detection, and ops screen updates

- Add build.rs and bundled_default_models.rs to frankensearch-embed for
  compile-time inclusion of default embedding models
- Expand auto_detect.rs with improved model selection heuristics and
  update lib.rs to re-export bundled defaults
- Update frankensearch-embed and frankensearch-fsfs Cargo.toml with new
  dependencies
- Extend fsfs output_schema.rs with additional output fields and
  substantially expand runtime.rs with new pipeline logic
- Refine ops TUI screens: fleet.rs rendering and project_detail.rs
  layout improvements
- Update README.md to reflect embedding model changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,7 +80,7 @@ Result: responsive first answers plus better final ranking without blocking the
 
 ## Core Features
 
-- Auto-download and model fallback chain (`fastembed`/`model2vec`/`hash`)
+- Bundled default semantic models (`potion-multilingual-128M` + `all-MiniLM-L6-v2`) with optional alternate-model downloads
 - Progressive search phases (`Initial`, `Refined`, `RefinementFailed`)
 - Agent-friendly streaming (`--stream`) with machine-readable output
 - Result explanation surfaces (`fsfs explain <result-id>`)
@@ -728,7 +728,7 @@ Use both: keep `rg` for exact matches and use `fsfs` for intent-level retrieval.
 ## FAQ
 
 ### Does it run fully local?
-Yes. Search/indexing runs on your machine. Network access is only needed when downloading models.
+Yes. Search/indexing runs on your machine. Network access is only needed for optional alternate-model downloads and update checks.
 
 ### Can I use only the library and skip `fsfs`?
 Yes. Add `frankensearch` as a dependency and wire your own app/runtime.

@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ hash = []
 model2vec = ["dep:safetensors", "dep:tokenizers"]
 fastembed = ["dep:fastembed"]
 download = ["asupersync/tls", "asupersync/tls-webpki-roots"]
+bundled-default-models = ["model2vec", "fastembed"]
 
 [dependencies]
 frankensearch-core = { workspace = true }
@@ -33,5 +34,8 @@ tempfile = "3"
 safetensors = { workspace = true }
 tokenizers = { workspace = true }
 
+[build-dependencies]
+sha2 = { workspace = true }
+
 [lints]
 workspace = true
